_comment: Written by scripts/regen-src-golden.mjs (#91). `sha256` must match tests/fixtures/src-bundle.golden.js — tests/src-bundle-parity.test.ts enforces it, so a hand-edited golden, or one regenerated by any means that skips the reason prompt, fails the gate.
reason: #106 (final): ScientistPercent/RScientistPercent (valueNegative, default -1 = Auto = today's divisor table => byte-identical unless opted into), the scientist bootstrap floor now respects ScientistPercent=0 (it hired 10 regardless, making the setting lie), live (32%) suffix on the job-ratio buttons (DOM text only), and tooltips for the three ratio boxes which had none. Positive-controlled on 02-mid-u1: default -1 => 0 divergences; ScientistPercent=25 => 75 divergences. (25 not 5: Auto is 9.09% on that save and AT never FIRES scientists, so a lower target is a no-op -- the setting can only ratchet up, which the tooltip now says.)
